text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like the weather's going to be nice on
our next day off. Maybe I'll go do some yoga.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yoga, huh?! Actually, I was just thinking about
doing some training on my day off too!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yoga is great for your core. Want to come with?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone! Let's start out with each of
your favorite poses.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh... You sure that's a yoga pose?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is my version of yoga! It adds effort and
makes me feel like I'm training!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get it, but coming up with your own
poses is pretty cool.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And I'm not done yet! I can still do better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know whether it's because of yoga or not,
but Bamboo Memory manages to get back to her
target racing weight.
